raw.objective: “To identify the factors influencing topiramate pharmacokinetics (PK) in a large population of adult patients with epilepsy using population PK analysis”
raw.covariates: Tested: age, sex, body weight (WT), height, serum creatinine, creatinine clearance (CLcr), total bilirubin, prothrombin time, albumin, AST, ALT, daily dose (DOSE), and concomitant medications (PHT, CLBZ, CLNZ, CBZ, VPA, LMT, LVT, OXC, pregabalin, PHB, and alprazolam) Included: DOSE, CLcr and co-medications on CL/F. WT on V/F.
raw.observations: Topiramate CL/F increased with comedication with PHT, CBZ, OXC, and PB. This population PK model can be helpful for individualizing the topiramate dosage regimen in clinical practice, especially for patients on polytherapy with PHT, CBZ, OXC, and PB.
raw.structure: 1-compartment model with first order absorption and elimination
raw.equations: CL/F = (theta1+theta2*CBZ+theta3*OXC+theta4*PHT+theta5*PB)*(CLcr/90)**theta6*(DOSE/100)**theta7*exp(eta1) V/F=theta8*WT/62 Cobs = Cipred*(1+eps1) + eps2 Notes: based on literature data, Ka was fixed to 2 h-1
raw.parameter_values: theta1=1.16 theta2=1.01 theta3=0.643 theta4=1.36 theta5=0.476 theta6=0.310 theta7=0.0929 theta8=109 omega1=0.019 sigma1=115 sigma2=0.100

extraction_target.title: Factors influencing topiramate clearance in adult patients with epilepsy: A population pharmacokinetic analysis.

structural_model.description: 1-compartment model with first order absorption and elimination

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

sigma.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending
Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

covariates: CLcr and co-medications on CL/F. WT on V/F.
extraction_target.residual_error: CL/F = (theta1+theta2*CBZ+theta3*OXC+theta4*PHT+theta5*PB)*(CLcr/90)**theta6*(DOSE/100)**theta7*exp(eta1) V/F=theta8*WT/62 Cobs = Cipred*(1+eps1) + eps2 Notes: based on literature data, Ka was fixed to 2 h-1
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.objective: “To identify the factors influencing topiramate pharmacokinetics (PK) in a large population of adult patients with epilepsy using population PK analysis”

included: CLcr and co-medications on CL/F. WT on V/F.
covariates.raw: Tested: age, sex, body weight (WT), height, serum creatinine, creatinine clearance (CLcr), total bilirubin, prothrombin time, albumin, AST, ALT, daily dose (DOSE), and concomitant medications (PHT, CLBZ, CLNZ, CBZ, VPA, LMT, LVT, OXC, pregabalin, PHB, and alprazolam) Included: DOSE, CLcr and co-medications on CL/F. WT on V/F.

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
